body:
Sadly, #1787 was 2 characters away (`<:`) from being correct, but the result was that it introduced a bug. GPU dispatching is broken on the main branch, this PR fixes the issue, and adds and fixes the test (which requires views to catch the `SubArray` case).

I've also defined `rebuild(data::IF{S, Nij}` since I found it was missing, and I've included `unit_ndims.jl` into the buildkite pipeline.

cc @trontrytel, @AlexisRenchon, @szy21
title: Fix broken GPU dispatching

body:
This PR refactors the terrain warp unit tests, which take over 10 minutes to run:

```julia
julia> using Revise; include(joinpath("test", "Spaces", "terrain_warp.jl"))
Test Summary:                    | Pass  Total     Time
2D Extruded Terrain Warped Space |  600    600  1m18.3s
Test Summary:                           | Pass  Total   Time
2D Extruded Terrain Laplacian Smoothing |  144    144  39.2s
Test Summary:                       | Pass  Total  Time
2D Warped Mesh RHS Integration Test |    2      2  1.6s
Test Summary:                    | Pass  Total     Time
3D Extruded Terrain Warped Space |  600    600  5m35.7s
Test Summary:                           | Pass  Total     Time
3D Extruded Terrain Laplacian Smoothing |   72     72  6m31.1s
```

Refactoring items include:

 - We pass `device` through, since it's type unstable (it depends on `ENV`)
 - Reduces the number of combinations that the tests are run for (some are currently testing 150 combinations of npoly, helem, velem, 300 including Float32+Float64)
 - Removed Float64 tests (those should converge if the Float64 converge)
 - Split `generate_base_spaces` into two type-stable methods
 - Combine the `test_throws` test with the one before it (to avoid recreating the same objects)

I think that there's more that can be done, but perhaps #1797 is a culprit here.

With these changes, the runtime looks more reasonable:

```julia
julia> using Revise; include(joinpath("test", "Spaces", "terrain_warp.jl"))
Test Summary:                    | Pass  Total   Time
2D Extruded Terrain Warped Space |   36     36  14.4s
Test Summary:                           | Pass  Total  Time
2D Extruded Terrain Laplacian Smoothing |   54     54  2.4s
Test Summary:                       | Pass  Total  Time
2D Warped Mesh RHS Integration Test |    2      2  4.2s
Test Summary:                    | Pass  Total   Time
3D Extruded Terrain Warped Space |   36     36  22.7s
Test Summary:                           | Pass  Total     Time
3D Extruded Terrain Laplacian Smoothing |   27     27  1m13.7s
Test Summary:                    | Pass  Total  Time
Interior Mesh `Adaption` ηₕ Test |    1      1  2.8s
Test Summary:                             | Pass  Total  Time
Interior Mesh `Adaption` (ηₕ=1, s=1) Test |   12     12  0.3s
```
title: Refactor terrain warp tests
